description: Log in to the GeoServer web admin at http://localhost:8080/geoserver/web/ (User: admin, Password: Admin123!). Configure the 'ne:ne_populated_places' layer to use a new default SLD style named 'clustered_places' that implements server-side point clustering. The style must use the 'gs:PointStacker' rendering transformation with a 'cellSize' of 60. Define two rendering rules based on the clustering count: clusters (count > 1) should be rendered as a Blue (#0000FF) Circle (size 22) with a White label showing the count, and single points (count = 1) should be rendered as a Red (#FF0000) Star (size 12).
